title: Derivar función desde especificación
prompt: I need to implement binary search on a sorted integer array. Don't just give me code — derive it correctly from a formal specification. Give me the pre/post conditions, then derive the implementation, and show me how to get the test cases from the postcondition.

assertions.text: States a formal precondition (e.g., array is sorted, lo <= hi)
States a formal postcondition (e.g., returns index i such that arr[i] == target, or -1)
Shows derivation steps leading to the code, not just the code
Derives test cases from the postcondition (e.g., target present, target absent, boundary)
The resulting binary search implementation is actually correct (handles all cases)
